title: Whimscape 1.21 Panorama
description: The Tricky Trials Panorama! Using Whimscape and Complementary Shaders
body: ### **Refresh your Minecraft panorama, or visit a previous but renewed version of it!** ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cf62f6ca51a96ca5a32032155d2343d701ce6bb.jpeg) **▼ Click here for the Whimscape Panorama Collection! ▼** **► Resource Pack: [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)** **■ Shaders: [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)** **★ Special Thanks to [Kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) for making Whimscape! ★**
